description_long: This object is a large, irregularly shaped stone with a roughly rounded, polyhedral form and a coarse, granular surface texture. Its exterior is pitted with small craters and bumps, giving it a rugged, natural appearance reminiscent of a weathered boulder or an asteroid fragment. The coloration is predominantly a medium to dark gray, with subtle variations in tone that suggest mineral inclusions and natural aging. One side of the stone features a slightly flatter, more angular face, while the rest of the surface is uneven and undulating. The stone appears solid and heavy, with no visible fractures or artificial modifications. Its overall form and texture suggest it could serve as a natural barrier or obstacle in an urban park, roadside, or landscaped area.
description: A large, rugged gray stone with a coarse, pitted surface and irregular, rounded shape. Its natural weathering and solid form make it a prominent obstacle or landscape feature.
description_view_0: This view shows the stone's broadest, most rounded face, highlighting its granular texture and subtle surface undulations.
description_view_1: This angle reveals a flatter, more angular side of the stone, with a noticeable edge and a denser concentration of surface pits.
description_view_2: Here, the stone's irregularity is emphasized, with a prominent bulge and a rough, uneven surface that appears slightly darker.
description_view_3: This view returns to a rounded aspect, similar to view 0, but with more visible surface craters and a slightly more shadowed appearance.
attribute_location: urban park, roadside verge, or landscaped plaza
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or natural barrier on the ground
attribute_pattern: irregular pitting and granular mottling, with no artificial carvings or regular veining
attribute_weathering: heavily weathered with a rough, pitted surface and minor discoloration from exposure
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: contrasts with manicured lawns or paved surfaces, but can blend with other natural stones or vegetation if present
